R

removeItem(Item, int) - Methode in Klasse model.items.Inventory
Removes a specified amount of an item from the inventory.
requestGameFocus() - Methode in Klasse view.gamewindow.GameWindow
Requests keyboard focus for the gameplay view.
Room - Klasse in model.dungeon
Represents a room in the dungeon.
Room() - Konstruktor für Klasse model.dungeon.Room
 
rooms - Variable in Klasse model.dungeon.Dungeon
Two-dimensional grid of rooms representing the dungeon layout.
RoundedCornerBorder - Klasse in view.utils
A custom Swing border that draws a rounded rectangle around a component.
RoundedCornerBorder() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.utils.RoundedCornerBorder
